description: check whether the NGC Holoscan container image for a CUDA tag suffix is already pulled (read-only)
rules: read-only — greps `docker images` for the clara-holoscan/holoscan image matching CUDA_TAG_SUFFIX; never pulls or runs anything
CUDA_TAG_SUFFIX is one of cuda13 | cuda12-dgpu | cuda12-igpu, derived from the nvidia-smi CUDA Version and GPU architecture
reports the matching image line if present, otherwise notes the image is not found for the variant
usage: Set CUDA_TAG_SUFFIX (one of cuda13 | cuda12-dgpu | cuda12-igpu). Output: ngc_image.txt.
limitation: Inspection only — does not pull the image or log in to NGC. Needs docker on PATH; without it (or when the image is not present) the report notes the image is not found. Trust this over a bare `docker images` since it scopes to the clara-holoscan/holoscan repository and CUDA variant.
